mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO boards(bno, writer_id, title, start_place_id, arr_place_id, start_date, end_date, transport_cost, food_cost, room_cost, etc_cost, arr_place_city) VALUES(seq_board.nextval, #{writerId}, '내 게시글', #{startPlaceId}, #{arrPlaceId}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),0,0,0,0,#{arrPlaceCity})
SELECT seq_board.CURRVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO like_boards(member_id, bno, like_time) VALUES(#{memberId}, #{bno}, SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM like_boards WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum rnum, b1.* FROM (SELECT p.place_id "placeId", p.name "name", p.category "category", p.address "address", p.lat "lat", p.lng "lng", NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1),0) "avgRating", COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_idx) "reviewCnt", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_places lp WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND lp.place_id = p.place_id) "isLiked" FROM blocks bl INNER JOIN boards b ON b.bno = bl.bno INNER JOIN places p ON bl.place_id = p.place_id LEFT OUTER JOIN reviews r ON bl.place_id = r.place_id WHERE b.bno = #{bno} GROUP BY p.place_id, p.name, p.category, p.address, p.lat, p.lng ORDER BY MIN(bl.start_time)) b1) b2 WHERE b2.rnum BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum rnum, b1.* FROM (SELECT p.place_id "placeId", p.name "name", p.category "category", p.address "address", p.lat "lat", p.lng "lng", NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1),0) "avgRating", COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_idx) "reviewCnt", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_places lp WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND lp.place_id = p.place_id) "isLiked" FROM like_places lp INNER JOIN places p ON lp.place_id = p.place_id LEFT OUTER JOIN reviews r ON r.place_id = lp.place_id WHERE lp.member_id = #{memberId} AND (6371 * ACOS( COS( (SELECT lat FROM places WHERE place_id = #{arrPlaceId}) * (ACOS(-1)/180) ) * COS( p.lat * (ACOS(-1)/180) ) * COS( (p.lng * (ACOS(-1)/180)) - (SELECT lng FROM places WHERE place_id = #{arrPlaceId}) * (ACOS(-1)/180)) + SIN( (SELECT lat FROM places WHERE place_id = #{arrPlaceId}) * (ACOS(-1)/180) ) * SIN( p.lat * (ACOS(-1)/180) ) )) <= 20 OR p.address LIKE (SELECT arr_place_city FROM boards WHERE bno = #{bno}) GROUP BY p.place_id, p.name, p.category, p.address, p.lat, p.lng) b1) b2 WHERE b2.rnum BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET title = #{title}, final_date = SYSDATE WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum rnum, b1.* FROM (SELECT p.place_id "placeId", p.name "name", p.category "category", p.address "address", p.lat "lat", p.lng "lng", NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1),0) "avgRating", COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_idx) "reviewCnt", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_places lp WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND lp.place_id = p.place_id) "isLiked" FROM places p LEFT OUTER JOIN reviews r ON p.place_id = r.place_id WHERE ( name LIKE #{input} OR category LIKE #{input} OR address LIKE #{input} ) AND (6371 * ACOS( COS( (SELECT lat FROM places WHERE place_id = #{arrPlaceId}) * (ACOS(-1)/180) ) * COS( p.lat * (ACOS(-1)/180) ) * COS( (p.lng * (ACOS(-1)/180)) - (SELECT lng FROM places WHERE place_id = #{arrPlaceId}) * (ACOS(-1)/180)) + SIN( (SELECT lat FROM places WHERE place_id = #{arrPlaceId}) * (ACOS(-1)/180) ) * SIN( p.lat * (ACOS(-1)/180) ) )) <= 20 OR p.address LIKE (SELECT arr_place_city FROM boards WHERE bno = #{bno}) GROUP BY p.place_id, p.name, p.category, p.address, p.lat, p.lng ORDER BY "reviewCnt" DESC, "name" DESC) b1) b2 WHERE b2.rnum BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET key = #{key}, ex_date = (SYSDATE + 1 / 24/10) WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE boards SET share_user_id = #{memberId} WHERE bno = #{bno} AND share_user_id IS NULL AND key = #{key} AND ex_date > SYSDATE
UPDATE boards SET start_date = TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), end_date = TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') , final_date = SYSDATE WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE boards SET final_date = SYSDATE WHERE bno=#{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT b.writer_id "writerId", b.title "title", b.start_date "startDate", b.end_date "endDate", b.max_cost "maxCost", b.transport_cost "transportCost", b.food_cost "foodCost", b.room_cost "roomCost", b.etc_cost "etcCost", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE b.bno = c.bno) "reviewCnt", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND lb.bno = b.bno) "isLiked", (SELECT COUNT(*)FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.bno = b.bno) "likedCnt" FROM boards b WHERE b.bno = #{bno}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO boards(bno, writer_id, title, final_date, start_place_id, arr_place_id, start_date, end_date, transport_cost, food_cost, room_cost, etc_cost, arr_place_city) SELECT seq_BOARD.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, '내 게시글', SYSDATE, #{startPlaceId}, arr_place_id, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + (end_date - start_date), transport_cost, food_cost, room_cost, etc_cost, arr_place_city FROM boards WHERE bno = #{bno}
SELECT seq_BOARD.CURRVAL FROM dual
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum rnum, b1.* FROM (SELECT DISTINCT bo.bno "bno", bo.title "title", EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bo.start_date) "year", EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bo.start_date) "month", SYSDATE - bo.final_date "elapsedTime", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.bno=bo.bno) "likedCnt", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.member_id = #{memberId} AND lb.bno = bo.bno) "isLiked" FROM boards bo INNER JOIN blocks bl ON bo.bno = bl.bno INNER JOIN places p ON bl.place_id = p.place_id ORDER BY "elapsedTime") b1) b2 WHERE b2.rnum BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum rnum, b1.* FROM (SELECT DISTINCT bo.bno "bno", bo.title "title", EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bo.start_date) "year", EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bo.start_date) "month", SYSDATE - bo.final_date "elapsedTime", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.bno=bo.bno) "likedCnt" FROM boards bo INNER JOIN blocks bl ON bo.bno = bl.bno INNER JOIN places p ON bl.place_id = p.place_id ORDER BY "elapsedTime") b1) b2 WHERE b2.rnum BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum rnum, b1.* FROM (SELECT DISTINCT bo.bno "bno", bo.title "title", EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bo.start_date) "year", EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bo.start_date) "month", SYSDATE - bo.final_date "elapsedTime", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.bno=bo.bno) "likedCnt", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.member_id = #{memberId} AND lb.bno = bo.bno) "isLiked" FROM boards bo INNER JOIN blocks bl ON bo.bno = bl.bno INNER JOIN places p ON bl.place_id = p.place_id WHERE ((bo.title LIKE #{input} ) OR (p.address LIKE #{input} )) ORDER BY 'likedCnt' DESC) b1) b2 WHERE b2.rnum BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum rnum, b1.* FROM (SELECT DISTINCT bo.bno "bno", bo.title "title", EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bo.start_date) "year", EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bo.start_date) "month", SYSDATE - bo.final_date "elapsedTime", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM like_boards lb WHERE lb.bno=bo.bno) "likedCnt" FROM boards bo INNER JOIN blocks bl ON bo.bno = bl.bno INNER JOIN places p ON bl.place_id = p.place_id WHERE ((bo.title LIKE #{input} ) OR (p.address LIKE #{input} )) ORDER BY 'likedCnt' DESC) b1) b2 WHERE b2.rnum BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT pl.lat "lat", pl.lng "lng" FROM places pl INNER JOIN blocks bl ON bl.place_id=pl.place_id WHERE bno=#{bno}
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET max_cost = #{maxCost}, transport_cost = #{transportCost}, food_cost = #{foodCost}, room_cost = #{roomCost}, etc_cost = #{etcCost}, final_date = SYSDATE WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE boards SET transport_cost = #{transportCost}, final_date = SYSDATE WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE boards SET food_cost = #{foodCost}, final_date = SYSDATE WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE boards SET room_cost = #{roomCost}, final_date = SYSDATE WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE boards SET etc_cost = #{etcCost}, final_date = SYSDATE WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT spot "spot", place_id "arrPlaceId" FROM recommended_places r ORDER BY num
